text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara got injured during today's training
session, so I rush her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew! Thank goodness! It's just a regular injury!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The doctor had such a serious face, so I was
worried I might be sick and need to get a shot!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Shots hurt way more than this does. Honestly, I
think I can still run, no problem!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So let's continue practice, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Please just rest up and recover.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What! Rest up? But I feel fine! Why?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ohhh. I see. You're worried about me. Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll rest up then! 'Cause, if you're not happy, I'm
not happy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Just sit back and relax, Urara... Just sit back and
relax...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ugh, but I wanna do something! Resting is just as bad as getting a shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara seems extremely bored, but at least
she's on the path to recovery.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Eek! Wh-why?
choice_data_list: If it gets worse, it'll hurt way more than a shot.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh? No way! Nothing hurts more than shots.
silly!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Watch this! I can walk around just fi―

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oof! Ow, ow, ow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because of her reckless movements, her injuries
worsen. She'll be out of commission for several
days.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Why are you so quiet, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh... Don't tell me... you're being serious?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh no! It can't be!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I don't care if I get bored! A pain worse than a shot sounds way, way, way worse!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll rest up and be back on my feet before you
know it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And when that happens, I'm gonna run like the
wind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes time before her injuries heal up, but she
eventually returns back to normal.
